title: JustHorrorMC
description: Forge 1.20.1 | Modpack with horror mods which radically changes the game.
body:
This is a horror modpack that adds some enities to your world.

Join my [Discord]([https://discord.gg/eMHPhhuhjV](https://discord.gg/eMHPhhuhjV)) for information and more modpacks.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfc8233fde3c138a841132e1dae190a3cc2386c6.png)

While playing you can hear creepy sounds, see something or somebody strange.

If you playing with friends, it is recommended to talk using a mod "Simple Voice Chat"

<details>
<summary>Horror mods</summary>

cave_dweller

From The Fog

The Man From The Fog

Paranoia

Sanity: Descent Into Madness

The Silence
</details>
